title: Chapter 33
content:
Chapter 33: Chapter 33: Just Continue

With the food arrived, Damon, Mio, and Mia began to eat. After they finish, Damon calls the waiters and asks for the payment.

"It will be 55 silver coins, young master." The waiter told him, then he tossed him a gold coin.

"You can keep the change." Damon said nonchalantly.

"T-thank you, young master!" The waiter shook and was grateful to Damon and bowed.

Then after leaving the restaurant, they walked a straight through the streets until they reached the other side of the city, where the gate was.

When he arrived at the gate, they found a large group of people and a few carriages waiting right outside the gate.

There were even a few people in robes that looked to be disciples of some sect mixed in with the crowd.

By the time they passed the guards and stepped out of the city, the majority of the crowd was already looking at them with many kinds of gazes.

Some gazes were filled with envy, while others looked at them with awe.

But of course, there were also a few females there who looked at Damon with adoring looks in their eyes.

While a few idiot men who don’t notice the black robe look at Mio and Mia with a lustful gaze.

Damon, Mio, and Mia ignore the crowd. However, his ears couldn’t help but pick up the whispers of the crowd.

"Hey, isn’t that Azure Dragon Sect core disciple robe?"

"Core disciple robe? The black one?"

"Yeah, the Azure Dragon Sect is only for the most talented. I heard that most of them are already Earth Spirit Realm before twenty-five."

"Whoa, that talented? Not only they are talented, but they also have stunningly beautiful appearance."

"Who is that guy? Looking at his robe, he is only an outer disciple. Why a core disciple together with an outer disciple? I bet they just stick to him because of his face."

Damon acting like he didn’t hear anything when the disciples from another sect within the crowd gossiping about them, but hearing the praise about his twin senior sisters, he couldn’t help to start to tease them.

"Heh... it seems I’m just lucky to be born with a handsome face, to be able to be together with such a beautiful senior sister." He gave a grin to Mio, who walked in front of him.

"Stop it, you already know that’s not the reason, right?" Mio stops Damon teasing as she turns her face around because she has a face to maintain. But Damon didn’t stop.

"Ahhh, so my face has no effect on the Esteemed Core Disciple of Azure Dragon Sect, Mio Nightrider." This time, Mio ignored him, turning her face back to the front. But he can hear Mia mumble.

"Your face does affect us... especially your dic..." her voice so small that only three of them can hear it.

Hearing what her sister said, Damon could see from her back that her neck was getting red.

Damon decides to stop; afraid they will run away like in the mission hall.

Damon, Mio, and Mia continued to walk until they found a luxury carriage. Mio asks the driver.

"How much to Crimson Moon City?"

Noticing Mio’s robe, the driver replied in a polite manner.

"Esteemed Young Lady, it will be 3 gold coins, but we have to stop by Swift Feather City, with the accommodation reservation for the night already included, and continue tomorrow. 2 gold coins up front for the travel to Swift Feather City and inn reservation, then 1 gold coin when we arrive."

Mio then gave the driver the gold coin and entered the carriage. Damon and Mia followed her, and soon all of them departed in the carriage.

****

Inside the carriage, Damon sits across Mio while Mia sits next to him. Looking around inside the carriage, it was a closed and luxurious carriage, with only one window in the entrance door, covered by a long silk veil, and then he couldn’t help but ask.

"Senior sister, why use a luxury carriage?"

"First, it’s private; we don’t have to wait or ride together with others. Second, it’s faster than standard carriage and has multiple arrays built in, like protection arrays and even noise suppression arrays."

Damon looked around and noticed dozens of protection arrays and even noise suppression arrays.

’

So, it’s like Ariel’s carriage.’

"I see, noise suppression array, huh..." he murmurs to himself, then a sly grin appears on his face.

"Senior sisters, since we will be inside the carriage for the whole day, how about I give you two a massage again?"

As soon as he said that he could see notifications popping out in front of his eyes.

[Mio’s Lust increased by 50 points, +250 lust points!]

[Mia’s Lust increased by 70 points, +580 lust points!]

He can see that both of them have a blush on their face now.

’I know what you two want. There’s no way you two will refuse me, hehehe.’

"S-sure, why not? since we have a lot of time to kill." Mio replied with stuttered words. She was embarrassed, but she wanted it.

But what surprised him was Mia, but instead of answering, she just climbed to his lap and waited. Looking at her action, a smirk appeared on his face.

’As expected, Closet Pervert, acting shy and quiet in front other but when time like this she becomes bold.’

"Then, since last time it was senior sister Mio first, now let senior sister Mia first, okay?"

Then Damon activated his Incubus celestial eyes and moved his hand toward Mia’s shoulder. As soon as he touched her, something that he didn’t expect happened.

Mia’s body began to shudder, and a loud moan escaped Mia’s mouth.

"Mmm~! Ahhn~!"

[Mia’s Lust increased by reaching maximum, +2000 lust points!]

[Mia’s Interest increased by 150 points, +1200 lust points!]

He could feel his lap getting soaked as Mia was climaxing just from one touch.

’Oh wow, she is really horny now. It seems she has been holding back.’

"Are you okay? Senior sister Mia?" Damon whispered to her ear while acting dumb.

"Mmm... I’m okay, it feels so good, just continue," she lied to him, hiding the fact that she already had her orgasm.

"Okay~"
